## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and technical improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Exec team has grown from 7 to \~20 people since the start of the year](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [GrowthX seeing 26% MoM traffic growth, with key pages on AI roleplay and stats performing well](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing existing high-performing pages and expanding into new areas like insurance agent roleplays](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Technical SEO improvements needed, including fixing HTTP links and addressing missing title tags/H1s](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

## Topics

### Exec Team Growth

  - [Exec has grown from 7 to \~20 people since the start of the year](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Recent hires include 2 engineers, a designer, product manager, and coaching solutions lead](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)

### GrowthX Content Performance

  - [26% MoM traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Key performing pages:](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - ["Best AI models for roleplays"](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [Stats-related content](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Insurance agent roleplay content showing promise (3% CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Long-tail keywords getting significant impressions (e.g., 87 impressions/month for longer queries)](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on optimizing two main articles:](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
    1.  Stats article: Add bullet points at the beginning for SERP visibility
    2.  AI roleplay article: Add FAQ section for long-tail keywords
  - [Consistent output of AI roleplay content (5 articles banked for next 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Exploring insurance-related keywords for future content](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [\~30 HTTP links need updating to HTTPS](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Missing title tag on homepage (to be fixed immediately)](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Some pages returning 200 status instead of 404 for non-existent content](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [H1 tags missing on some pages (coach pages, series page, homepage)](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Orphan pages exist but are intentional (e.g., individual coach pages, product pages for sales)](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Discovered FullyRamped targeting "Better than Exec AI roleplay" keyword](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Exec currently dominating AI Overview box in SERPs for relevant queries](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to focus on updating HTTP links to HTTPS](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [Sean to fix title tags and add missing H1s](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Continue current content strategy with focus on AI roleplay and stats content](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Elvis to conduct a deep dive into insurance-related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Elvis to rerun SEO audit and check Search Console for any major issues](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
  - [Sean to address 200 status code issue for non-existent pages](https://fathom.video/share/G6y6F7yQ6emCiD5pAcqkomA2iLD3z_6-?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
